productDisplayName: Nike Women Black Fivekay Sports Shoes
description: Style NoteThe nike Fivekay women's shoe is an iconic design and an all-time athletic favorite. Taken from the tennis courts and loved for its impressive versatility, the Fivekay features premium metallic finishes for flavor and a Fit perfect for dependable comfort. Deepika Padukone's been caught wearing one of these, so why shouldn't you? Product DetailsSynthetic upper and reinforced toe tip for durabilityHas a Nike swoosh branding at the midfootLace-up for snug fitNike brand tag appliqued on the tonguePull tag to slide your foot in easilyAutoclave midsole for lightweight comfortSolid rubber outsole with herringbone pattern for traction and durability. Material and CareSyntheticWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
